findings: No active Fix-It Feed posts in production.

No new Fix-It posts/comments/attachments, objective comments/messages, objective_updates, objective row changes, org-chart edits, NCR rows/events/imports, KPI rows/events/imports, OKR project rows/events, or objective agent runs were created or updated in the review window.

Jake Feil and Mercileidy Jimenez activity in the review window was limited to scheduled email_delivery_log reminder/overdue rows and passive alt_dashboard_presence updates; neither is a requested change or bug report.
No failed email_delivery_log rows and no persistent push_delivery_log rows were found in the review window.
Six existing open Jake/Mercileidy-owned or created objectives remain unchanged from prior runs; they are operational records, not new implementation requests.

cleanup: Production push smoke cleanup verified zero leftovers via npm run smoke:push:prod.

validations: npm run smoke:prod passed (6/6 Playwright checks)
